name: Queen Pressure
description: Reward active queen pressure without treating it as a king-net template.

name: Any Capture
description: Give a simple bonus to any move that captures material.

name: Winning Capture
description: Reward captures that win material compared with the moved piece.

name: Free Capture
description: Reward captures that appear safe or low-risk.

name: Recapture
description: Reward recapturing after the opponent has taken material.

name: Kick Material
description: Reward moves that attack or pressure valuable enemy material.

name: Even Trade
description: Encourage trades that exchange comparable material.

name: Winning
description: Reward move patterns that improve a winning material position.

name: Winning Attack
description: Reward attacking continuations when the bot is already winning.

name: Safety
description: General defensive checks for safer move selection.

name: Retain Defense
description: Prefer moves that keep important pieces defended.

name: Avoid Hanging Pieces
description: Discourage moves that leave pieces hanging.

name: Escape Check Safely
description: Prefer safe replies when escaping check-like danger.

name: Hide From Attacks
description: Reward moving away from enemy attacks.

name: Pawns Protect Majors
description: Encourage pawn structures that protect major pieces.

name: Endgame
description: Detect and reward endgame-specific move priorities.

name: Avoid Stalemate
description: Discourage moves that leave the enemy with no legal mobility when not mating.

name: Force Stalemate When Losing
description: Seek stalemate resources when materially losing.

name: Checkmate
description: Return hard for moves that appear to leave the enemy king checkmated.

name: Direct King Pressure
description: Reward direct attacks or pressure against the enemy king.

name: Tighten The Net
description: Reward moves that reduce enemy king mobility.

name: Strip King Shelter
description: Reward moves that remove or pressure pieces sheltering the enemy king.

name: Opening Game Condition
description: Detect an early opening state by checking that both sides still have high material.

name: Safe Knight Development
description: Reward knight development that improves the moved knight without walking into danger.

name: Safe Bishop Development
description: Reward bishop development that improves the moved bishop without walking into danger.

name: Castling
description: Approximate castling intent by rewarding king movement toward allied rook structure.

name: Queen Safety
description: Discourage early queen movement or exposed queen placement.

name: Push Safe Pawns
description: Reward pawn pushes that do not create obvious tactical problems.

name: Attack Pawns
description: Reward attacks against enemy pawns.

name: Improve Pawn Mobility
description: Reward pawn moves that improve pawn mobility.

name: Discourage Pawn Roaming
description: Discourage pawn movement that wanders away from useful structure.

name: Avoid Pawn Attacks
description: Discourage moves that leave the moved piece attacked by enemy pawns.

name: Safe Promotion
description: Reward promotion pushes that appear safe.

name: Knight Fork
description: Reward knight moves that fork multiple valuable enemy pieces.

name: Bishop Fork
description: Reward bishop moves that fork multiple valuable enemy pieces.

name: Queen Pin
description: Reward queen moves that create pin-like pressure.

name: Rook Pin
description: Reward rook moves that create pin-like pressure.

name: Queen Skewer
description: Reward queen moves that create skewer-like pressure.

name: Rook Skewer
description: Reward rook moves that create skewer-like pressure.

name: Discovered Attack
description: Reward moves that uncover attacks from another allied piece.

name: Discovered Check
description: Reward moves that uncover pressure against the enemy king.

name: Dual King Threat
description: Reward moves that create multiple threats around the enemy king.

name: Open File Rook
description: Reward rook activity on open or newly opened files.

name: Connect Majors
description: Encourage coordination between major pieces.

data.title: Connect Majors
data.notes:
NOT BEHAVING AS DESIRED
counts aggregate value of allies defending and defended
